description: Set tolerance parameters for rblock contact detection and overlap calculations.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock tolerance ...') via command interface

keywords.name: constant
keywords.description: Assign the constant contact-detection tolerance. This is assigned on a per-rigid block basis.

keywords.name: extent
keywords.description: Assign the extent contact-detection tolerance. This is a global setting for all rigid blocks.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Assign the velocity contact-detection tolerance. This is a global setting for all rigid blocks.
